_comment: Registry for the Material warning/error banner (infobar) severity contract
(docs/design/07-feedback.md 7.6). Source-implementation ledger only: it does not claim a
native build, dialog pixels, or runtime accessibility evidence. Validate with
The contract: every InfobarType severity resolves a Material container/on-container pair from
semantic StyleSettings feedback slots (INFO -> primary-container highlight roles, WARNING ->
warning-container, DANGER -> error-container) or from the single shared NotificationTheme
resolved-green (SUCCESS), never from an infobar-local hex literal; the strip paints the
corner-container (12px) radius in code with a high-contrast square bypass; a polite live
announcement (AccessibleRole::NOTIFICATION + refreshed accessible name) names the severity in
words; and infobar.ui carries the 7.6 padding/gap/icon geometry.
Note: 7.6 is a warning/error chapter and defines no INFO/SUCCESS container tokens; INFO reuses
the primary-container highlight roles and SUCCESS reuses the NotificationTheme resolved-green
accent (a filled surface with a white on-color), a documented divergence from the light-tint
